calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-07-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-03-2022 Continued To Jun-07-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-29-2022 Continued To May-03-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sean Patrick Miller, via zoom, for Kevon Woodard, Personal Representative.

The court advises counsel of its tentative ruling to continue this matter to allow the resolution of the Aurelia Estate matter. Mr. Miller offers testimony regarding the elderly parties in this matter and asks that the court consider ordering partial distributions at this time. The court advises counsel that it does not intend to resolve this matter piecemeal and advises counsel to consider filing an amended petition and to follow court protocol regarding proper notice.

After additional discussion, the Accounting Petition is continued to May-03-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Cristobal. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-08-2022 Continued To Mar-29-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sean Miller appeared by zoom for and with Kevin Woodard by zoom.

The court informed Mr. Miller that it is leaning towards continue this matter to a date after the March 15th hearing on the Aurelia Trust matter. Mr. Miller stated that they have three beneficiaries that are independent of the concerns regarding the aurelia matter, that they are elderly, that one is having surgery today, that he has no problem continuing this today and asked the court if it would consider distribution to those three parties. Mr. Miller's request is denied without prejudice. The First and Account and Report, etc. is continued to March 29, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: L. Maloney. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
